steps.title: Identify the crucial contrast
steps.content: The two works are classified in different genres: Rocannon's World is science fiction, while The Farthest Shore is fantasy. The transition word must signal this opposition.

steps.title: Select the contrast marker
steps.content:
Sentence 1 classifies one Le Guin novel as science fiction; sentence 2 classifies a different Le Guin novel as fantasy. The relationship is contrast.
  • "Afterward,": signals temporal sequence; the sentences compare two novels, not events in time. ✗
  • "In other words,": signals restatement of the same idea; but sentence 2 contrasts with sentence 1, not restates it. ✗
  • "For example,": signals a specific instance of a general claim; but neither novel is an example of the other. ✗
  • "On the other hand,": signals direct contrast — exactly fits the science fiction vs. fantasy comparison. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
